summary: The incident involved packet loss and latency spikes in the Montreal cluster (EAGG-MTL-02) due to BGP flaps and subsequent FAN-TRAY-2 failure. The technician Maria L successfully replaced the failed fan tray, leading to a recovery period of approximately 96 seconds with BGP convergence within that timeframe.

reasonings.title: Packet Loss Spike
reasonings.explanation: A sudden increase in packet loss from 12 ms to 241 ms was observed in the Montreal cluster (EAGG-MTL-02). This suggests network instability or congestion.

reasonings.title: BGP Flaps
reasonings.explanation: BGP flaps were detected, indicating a disruption in Border Gateway Protocol communication between different networks.

reasonings.title: FAN-TRAY-2 Failure
reasonings.explanation: The FAN-TRAY-2 component, which is responsible for cooling fans, experienced a failure.

reasonings.title: Fan Tray Replacement
reasonings.explanation: Maria L successfully replaced the faulty FAN-TRAY-2.
